info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Outbound Delivery API
info.description:
Create and manage outbound deliveries, goods issue, and shipping documents in SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV) supports delivery creation with reference to sales orders, picking confirmation, goods issue posting, and subsequent logistics processing. Part of the Delivery Processing Integration (SAP_COM_0106) communication scenario.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support

item.name: Retrieve a list of outbound deliveries

request.description: Returns a collection of outbound delivery headers. Supports OData query options for filtering by delivery date, shipping point, sold-to party, delivery status, and other attributes.

item.name: Post goods issue for an outbound delivery

query.description: (Required) Delivery document number for goods issue

request.description: Triggers the goods issue posting for the specified outbound delivery. This operation updates inventory and creates material documents.
